candidate_check.description: Use of the QUIC protocol must be disabled.

check_content_excerpt:
The policy value for "Computer Configuration/Administrative Templates/Microsoft Edge/Allow QUIC protocol" must be set to "Disabled".

Use the Windows Registry Editor to navigate to the following key:
HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Edge

If the value for "QuicAllowed" is not set to "REG_DWORD = 0", this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt: Set the policy value for "Computer Configuration/Administrative Templates/Microsoft Edge/Allow QUIC protocol" to "Disabled".
title: Use of the QUIC protocol must be disabled.
